title: At Least 3 Ships Are Struck Around Strait of Hormuz, and Iran Claims One
summary_full: Three vessels were hit in and around the Persian Gulf on Wednesday, according to a British maritime agency. Iran claimed responsibility for one.
summary_public: Three vessels were hit in and around the Persian Gulf on Wednesday, according to a British maritime agency. Iran claimed responsibility for one.
